subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward God! What can I write? For the effulgent rays of the Ancient Beauty's grace have encompassed the kingdom of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر الی الله چه نویسم زیرا تجلیات عنایت جمال ابهی ملکوت وجود را احاطه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power of faith; power of the spirit
